Records.authors: Böttcher, Nico, Schwanemann, Niklas, Weinzierl, Stefan
Records.description: Two-loop box integral with fermion bubble insertion, fully massless case. Topology H: all internal masses zero, all external momenta massless. Simplest topology with only 3 master integrals and 3-letter alphabet $\{-s, -t, -s-t\}$. All gauge bosons are photons, green line massless. Relevant to Moller experiment ($e^-e^-$ scattering).
Records.familyName: Box with fermion bubble, topology H (0, 0, 0)

Records.authors: Bargiela, Piotr, Frellesvig, Hjalte, Marzucca, Robin, Morales, Roger, Seefeld, Florian, Wilhelm, Matthias, Yang, Tong-Zhi
Records.description: $I^{*}_{4,1,1}$ two-loop topology with three internal paths of lengths a=4, b=1, c=1 (only one of v_L/v_R carries external legs); 4-point integral, planar (b=1). Geometry: 0 ISPs; algebraic leading singularity; dlog form (§3.4 zero-ISPs)

Names: Box with fermion bubble, topology H (0, 0, 0)

Results.resultTeXPreview: \frac{9}{4 \varepsilon^3 s_{12} s_{23}}-\frac{3 i \left(2 i \log \left(\frac{s_{23}}{s_{12}}\right)-3 i \log (s_{23})+3 \pi +3 i\right)}{2 \varepsilon^2 s_{12} s_{23}}-\frac{3 \left(-5 \zeta(2)-4 \log ^2\left(-\frac{s_{12}}{s_{23}}\right)-6 \log ^2\left(\frac{s_{23}}{s_{12}}\right)-8 \log \left(\frac{s_{23}}{s_{12}}\right) \log \left(-\frac{s_{12}}{s_{23}}\right)+8 \log (s_{23}) \log \left(\frac{s_{23}}{s_{12}}\right)+8 i \pi  \log \left(\frac{s_{23}}{s_{12}}\right)-8 \log \left(\frac{s_{23}}{s_{12}}\right)-6 \log ^2(s_{23})+6 \log (-s_{23})-12 i \pi  \log (s_{23})+6 \log (s_{23})+5 \pi ^2+6 i \pi -12\right)}{4 \varepsilon (s_{12} s_{23})}+(\text{more terms})+O\left(\varepsilon^1\right)
